emptyOpenDesc: All sites are running normally; issues will be summarized here when they arise.
emptyResolvedDesc: No alerts have been marked as resolved yet.
emptyAllDesc: There are no alert records at the moment.
settingsDesc: Once configured, new critical / warning alerts are pushed to this webhook. Leave empty and save to disable push.
webhookHint: Supports http(s):// URLs such as WeCom / Feishu / Slack bots. Empty = disabled.
webhookInvalid: Only addresses starting with http:// or https:// are supported
emailDesc: Also deliver alerts to a mailbox. Takes effect only after SMTP is configured on the server.
emailHint: Recipient address for alert emails. Requires RP_SMTP_* environment variables on the server; leave empty to disable email.
emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
